tests.name: Verify that a registered user can log in with email+password and reach the products dashboard
Verify the products page is accessible after login and shows a meaningful empty state when user has no product grants
tests.message: [Step 6][Status: failed][Error: No meaningful call-to-action found. The page shows "You do not have access to any products yet" but provides no actionable next steps like "Get started", "Add a product", "Contact us", or "Request access" buttons/links.]
